zh.lifeSummary: 當Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix於大約1135年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可馬庫爾時，他的父親Garsire II de Retz32歲，母親Adénore de Prigny27歲。他和Stéphanie de Prigny至少有1個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Raix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Luigi, Vincenzo, Vito, Carmine, Domenico, Francesco, Gaetano, Gaspare, Genario, Gino, Giuseppe.
Italian (southern):
topographic name from raia ‘smilax’ (a climbing shrub).

variants.name: Raio
meanings: Italian: possibly a nickname from southern Italian rajo ‘ray’. See also Raia .
Portuguese: nickname from raio ‘lightning’.

variants.name: La Raia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Sal.

Italian (southern; mainly Laraia): nickname from raja ‘ray, skate’ (the fish) or a topographic name from raia ‘smilax’ (a climbing shrub), with the addition of the definite article la. See also Raia 1, 2.

variants.name: Raiola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Enrico, Filomena, Pasquale, Salvatore.
Italian: possibly from a derivative of   Raia  .

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).
Chinese: variant of   Ge  .

nameMeanings.name: Retz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German:
habitational name from any of several places called Retz or Retzen in northwestern Germany and Austria.
from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names formed with rād, rāt ‘advice, counsel’.

variants.name: Retzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Helmut, Helmuth, Reinhold.
German:
habitational name for someone from Retz in Austria (see   Retz  ).

nameMeanings.name: Hascot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname perhaps from Middle English merren ‘to harm’, also ‘to injure or kill’ + Scot ‘Scot’.

en.lifeSummary: When Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix was born about 1135, in Machecoul, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Garsire II de Retz, was 32 and his mother, Adénore de Prigny, was 27. He had at least 1 daughter with Stéphanie de Prigny.

ko.lifeSummary: Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix(이)가 대략 1135년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 맥헤콜에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Garsire II de Retz(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Adénore de Prigny(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Stéphanie de Prigny(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
